checks.describe: the deep-dive reads the embedded Chroma index the lab built and host Ollama for embeddings. Self-seeds the stack and ingests if the index is empty
checks.run: curl -fsS --max-time 3 http://localhost:8001/health >/dev/null 2>&1 || make -C labs/opsmate up >/dev/null 2>&1; [ "$(curl -s http://localhost:8001/health | jq -r '.chunks // 0')" -gt 0 ] 2>/dev/null || curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8001/ingest >/dev/null 2>&1; C=$(curl -s --max-time 10 http://localhost:8001/health | jq -r '.chunks // 0'); if [ "$C" -gt 0 ] 2>/dev/null; then echo index-ready; else echo index-empty; fi

checks.describe: the hybrid + cross-encoder reranker script runs against the built index and reports a rank-1-correct tally for all three strategies (section 2). Downloads the CPU cross-encoder once
checks.run: OLLAMA_URL=http://localhost:11434 CHROMA_DIR=labs/opsmate/data/chroma uv run --quiet labs/m4/rerank.py 2>/dev/null | grep -Ec 'vector|hybrid|rerank' | xargs -I{} sh -c 'if [ {} -ge 3 ]; then echo rerank-ok; else echo rerank-fail; fi'

checks.describe: the chunking trade-off probe rebuilds the corpus at 100/300/800 token caps and reports a top hit + distance per cap (section 3). Uses ephemeral in-memory indexes, never touches the persistent one
checks.run: OLLAMA_URL=http://localhost:11434 CORPUS_DIR=labs/opsmate/corpus uv run --quiet labs/m4/rechunk_probe.py 'website throwing 500 errors' 2>/dev/null | grep -Ec '^ +(100|300|800) ' | xargs -I{} sh -c 'if [ {} -ge 3 ]; then echo rechunk-ok; else echo rechunk-fail; fi'
